title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties Advisory Limited:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties Advisory Limited!
